category_sources: Official uutils coreutils documentation and repository describe the project as Rust coreutils.
source_facts.description says uutils-coreutils is a cross-platform Rust rewrite of GNU coreutils.
display_name_sources: Official docs and repository use uutils/coreutils and uutils-coreutils naming.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official uutils coreutils site, which links to dedicated documentation.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository with README and source documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a cross-platform Rust rewrite of GNU coreutils.
source_facts.executables lists many uu-prefixed GNU coreutils-compatible commands.
